concepts.title: Feature definitions and computation
concepts.hook: Centralized feature library; compute once, reuse everywhere.

concepts.title: Online vs offline feature stores
concepts.hook: Offline for training; online for low-latency serving.

concepts.title: Feature freshness and staleness SLOs
concepts.hook: How up-to-date features must be; varies by use case.

concepts.title: Point-in-time correctness and data leakage prevention
concepts.hook: Training features must use only data available at prediction time.

concepts.title: Data warehouse architecture (star schema, fact/dimension tables)
concepts.hook: Organized storage for analytics and training data.

concepts.title: ETL vs ELT
concepts.hook: Transform before or after loading; ELT more flexible with cloud databases.

concepts.title: Incremental and full refresh logic
concepts.hook: Full refresh: simple, expensive; incremental: efficient, complex.
